top_signals.title: China's Alibaba bans Anthropic AI for employees after 'distillation attack' accusation
top_signals.summary: Chinese e-commerce giant Alibaba has put Anthropic's Claude Code on a high-risk software list.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s PBOC Buys Most Gold Since 2023 as Bullion Swings
top_signals.summary: China’s central bank bought more gold in June, extending the longest buying streak since at least 2015 and underscoring a commitment to diversifying its reserve despite volatility in bullion prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Microsoft to axe 4,800 jobs as it resets Xbox
top_signals.summary: Gaming unit under pressure from weak margins and the industry’s sharp hardware downturn
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Klarna seeks U.S. bank charter in latest push beyond buy now, pay later
top_signals.summary: Klarna joins a wave of fintech and crypto firms seeking entry to the traditional banking system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Mixed signals, research findings, and policy judgements − speech by Catherine L. Mann
top_signals.summary: Given at the Natixis CIB Private Debt Forum
